name: com.shinn.timeline
description:
Custom Unity Timeline tracks.

- Custom-Text: drive UGUI Text (and TextMeshPro via sample) content, color and font size from timeline clips.
- Custom-UnityEvent: UnityEvent-style clip — drag any Object (GameObject, Light, custom MonoBehaviour, ...) and invoke one of its public methods at clip start. Supported parameters: void, int, float, string, bool, Vector2/3/4, Color, Quaternion, enum, and UnityEngine.Object (project assets). Property setters are listed too. Fires in Play mode only. Replaces the old Custom-Event / Custom-MSG tracks (2.0.0).
- Custom-AVProMediaPlayer: AVPro media player control track (via sample).

Samples include a demo scene and timeline for Custom-UnityEvent.

samples.description: TextMeshPro variant of the Custom-Text track: drive TMP text content, color and font size from timeline clips. Requires com.unity.textmeshpro / uGUI 2.0+.
Timeline track for controlling AVPro Video media playback from clips, with a demo scene and timeline (see the sample README for setup). Requires the AVPro Video plugin.

Demo scene and timeline for the Custom-UnityEvent track: logs a message (string), dims a Light (float property setter) and hides a Cube (bool) at 1s/2s/3s. Includes a demo MonoBehaviour used as the invocation target.
